servicesPage.intro: At GPFS Plumbing & Fire Supply, we offer a full range of plumbing and fire protection services in Dallas, TX. Whether you need emergency repairs or a new fire suppression system, our team delivers expert solutions with integrity.

services.title: Emergency Plumbing Repairs
services.shortDescription: 24/7 emergency plumbing services for burst pipes, leaks, and clogs.
services.longDescription: When plumbing disasters strike, GPFS is ready to respond. Our emergency team arrives quickly with the tools and expertise to stop damage and restore your system. We handle everything from burst pipes to overflowing toilets, ensuring minimal disruption to your home or business.
benefits: Upfront pricing with no overtime surprises

process.title: Call & Dispatch
process.description: Call our emergency line, and we'll dispatch a plumber immediately.

process.title: Diagnose & Fix
process.description: We assess the issue and perform repairs on the spot.

process.title: Clean Up & Prevent
process.description: We clean the work area and advise on preventive measures.

faqs.question: Do you charge extra for emergency calls?
faqs.answer: We offer transparent pricing with no hidden fees. Emergency rates are clearly communicated before work begins.

faqs.question: How fast can you arrive?
faqs.answer: We typically arrive within 60 minutes for emergencies in the Dallas area.

services.title: Water Heater Installation & Repair
services.shortDescription: Expert water heater services including tankless and traditional units.
services.longDescription: From traditional tank heaters to modern tankless systems, GPFS installs, repairs, and maintains all types of water heaters. We help you choose the right size and energy-efficient model to lower utility bills and ensure reliable hot water.

process.title: Consultation
process.description: We assess your hot water needs and recommend the best system.

process.title: Installation
process.description: Our technicians install your new water heater safely and efficiently.

process.title: Testing & Tips
process.description: We test the system and provide maintenance tips for longevity.

faqs.question: How long does a water heater installation take?
faqs.answer: Most installations are completed in 2-4 hours depending on the system.

faqs.question: What size water heater do I need?
faqs.answer: We consider household size and usage to recommend the perfect size for efficiency.

services.title: Fire Extinguisher & Suppression Systems
services.shortDescription: Sales, installation, and inspection of fire extinguishers and suppression systems.
services.longDescription: Protect your property with our comprehensive fire protection services. We supply and install fire extinguishers, sprinkler systems, and kitchen suppression systems. Our team ensures all equipment meets local codes and is ready for emergencies.

process.title: Site Assessment
process.description: We evaluate your property to determine fire protection needs.

process.title: System Design
process.description: We design a system tailored to your building's layout and risks.

process.title: Installation & Testing
process.description: We install and test all components for proper operation.

faqs.question: How often should fire extinguishers be inspected?
faqs.answer: Monthly visual checks and annual professional inspections are recommended.

faqs.question: Do you offer training on fire extinguisher use?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide basic training on proper use for your staff or family.

services.title: Drain Cleaning & Sewer Services
services.shortDescription: Professional drain cleaning and sewer line repair using advanced tools.
services.longDescription: Clogged drains and sewer backups are messy and stressful. GPFS uses hydro-jetting and video inspection to clear blockages and identify underlying issues. We repair or replace damaged sewer lines with minimal excavation.

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We use a camera to locate the blockage and assess pipe condition.

process.title: Cleaning
process.description: Hydro-jetting or snaking clears the line thoroughly.

process.title: Repair or Maintenance
process.description: If needed, we repair damaged pipes or schedule regular maintenance.

faqs.question: What causes recurring clogs?
faqs.answer: Grease buildup, tree roots, or pipe damage often cause repeated clogs. We identify and fix the root cause.

faqs.question: Is hydro-jetting safe for old pipes?
faqs.answer: Yes, our hydro-jetting is safe for most pipe materials. We adjust pressure based on pipe condition.

about.headline: About GPFS Plumbing & Fire Supply
about.mission: Our mission is to provide Dallas with reliable plumbing and fire protection services that prioritize safety, quality, and customer satisfaction.
story: GPFS Plumbing & Fire Supply was founded with a simple vision: deliver exceptional service that Dallas residents and businesses can count on. With over 15 years of experience, our team has grown from a small operation to a trusted name in plumbing and fire protection. We've built our reputation on honesty, craftsmanship, and a commitment to doing the job right the first time.

Today, GPFS continues to serve the Dallas community with a full range of services, from emergency repairs to comprehensive fire suppression systems. Our licensed technicians stay up-to-date with the latest technology and codes, ensuring your property is safe and efficient. We're proud to be a local business that treats every customer like a neighbor.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We do what we say, with transparent pricing and honest advice.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We use top-grade materials and proven techniques for lasting results.

coreValues.title: Safety
coreValues.description: Every job is performed with safety as the top priority.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We're proud to serve and support the Dallas community.

contact.headline: Get in Touch with GPFS
contact.subheadline: We're here to help with all your plumbing and fire protection needs.
